verdict.primary_question: Can it be proven anonymous visitors could discover/browse/buy throughout GetPawsy's lifetime?
verdict.answer: NO — only partially, for narrow windows.
proven_working_days: 2026-01-14 to 2026-01-18 (evidence: 2 anon paid orders on Jan 18)

proven_broken_windows.cause: products_public flipped to security_invoker without anon RLS on products; anon queries returned 0 rows.

uncertain_windows.reason: No positive anon-traffic proof retained; 41 migrations touched products/policies; 0 anon paid orders in 162 days. Cannot prove continuous availability from evidence retained today.

verdict.lifetime_operational_pct: UNKNOWN (proven-working ≥ ~4 days; proven-broken ≥ ~3 days; remainder unverifiable from current evidence).
verdict.prior_qa_bias_pct_estimate: ≥95% of past validations likely used admin/service_role sessions which bypass RLS — false-negative on anon-access failures.
verdict.explains_organic_sales_absence: PLAUSIBLY YES — proven-broken window covered peak Pinterest publishing period; combined with silent 148-day gap this is the highest-confidence single explanation on the table.
verdict.next_highest_bottleneck: After the storefront fix, the remaining highest-confidence bottleneck is TRAFFIC QUALITY / ORGANIC VOLUME — Pinterest creative pipeline paused on AI-credit HTTP 402; no anon-attributed sessions with UTM converge on PDP → ATC.

timeline.detail: products table created with policy 'Products are publicly readable' → anon SELECT worked
2 anonymous paid orders (c8888426, 50332a97) — proves anon checkout functioned that day
Zero anonymous paid orders across 148 days despite active site
Single paid order in May (user-attributed, not anon)
ALTER VIEW products_public SET (security_invoker=true) WITHOUT adding anon RLS on products → storefront returns 0 rows for anon
Anonymous PostgREST queries returned 0 products for ~76h. Admin/service role continued to see all products, masking the incident.
Flipped view to security_invoker=off + GRANT SELECT anon,authenticated. Anon returns 342 products.
Restored security_invoker=on + narrow anon RLS policy on products (is_active, in-stock, listable). Anon still returns 342.

alternative_hypotheses.refutes: Even at that volume 0 add-to-cart events observed → funnel break, not volume-only
2 paid anon orders on Jan 18 prove checkout can function
Jan 18 anon sales prove it worked at genesis
alternative_hypotheses.verdict: ROOT CAUSE for June blackout; suspected for silent periods

root_cause_tree: Security linter flag on SECURITY DEFINER view
→ view now inherits caller RLS; products table has admin-only policies
→ HomePage bestsellers filter (is_active=true) returns empty result
